# .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md

---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project.
title: "[FEAT] - Brief description of the feature" # Pre-fills the issue title
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-discussion"] # Add relevant labels
assignees: [] # Optional: Assign specific users
---

**1. Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
> A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**2. Describe the solution you'd like:**
> A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**3. Describe alternatives you've considered:**
> A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**4. Target Audience / Use Case:**
> Who would benefit from this feature? How would they use it?
> _(Consider user stories: "As a [type of user], I want [some goal] so that [some reason].")_

**5. Potential Implementation (Optional):**
> If you have ideas on how this could be implemented, please share them.

**6. Additional Information (Optional):**
> Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or links relevant to the feature request here.
